one_line_ask: Take two client-shot raw corporate images (a plant-floor engineer-by-equipment hero and an executive portrait), professionally retouch and color-grade them to one consistent premium look, declutter the busy backgrounds the allowed way, then export a web-optimized responsive set (desktop/tablet/mobile) plus a Firefly board for sign-off.
brief:
We are launching a new corporate website for our industrial / CNC-machining business and need a Photoshop expert to professionally retouch a set of images so they look premium, modern, and consistent. Attached are two client-shot RAW-ish JPEGs straight off the camera: (1) HERO — a process engineer standing beside a CNC machining centre on the plant floor, shot under mixed fluorescent + window light so it is slightly underexposed, cool/green-cast, and the background is cluttered with parts bins, cables and a fire extinguisher; (2) a paired executive half-body portrait shot in the same facility, warmer but flat and low-contrast.

We need you to: correct the lighting imbalance and exposure on the hero; pull the white balance neutral and add real contrast, color and sharpness so it reads premium; clean up the distracting background clutter behind the engineer (we don't want a fake studio look — keep it authentic, just calm it down) and gently throw the background out of focus so the subject pops; then carry the EXACT same finished look onto the executive portrait so the two images are visually consistent as a set. Once the look is locked, prepare web-optimized, responsive exports of th
